Live integration (dashboard started via node scripts/keel-dashboard.cjs, bound 127.0.0.1:7772) — allowed hosts: Host 127.0.0.1:7772 -> 200 text/html + nosniff + no-store, body is dashboard HTML containing KEEL-105 story row; Host localhost (no port) -> 200; Host LOCALHOST:7772 -> 200 (case-insensitive). All PASS.

Live integration — disallowed hosts: Host evil.com -> 403; evil.com:7772 -> 403 (port does not whitelist); localhost.evil.com:7772 -> 403 (rebinding suffix); empty Host value -> 403; bad Host + /nope -> 403 not 404 (guard before routing). Body exactly 'Forbidden' with Content-Type text/plain; charset=utf-8, X-Content-Type-Options nosniff, Cache-Control no-store; no request data echoed (ADR-004 D-3). All PASS.

Live integration — missing Host (ADR-004 D-1): raw-socket HTTP/1.0 GET without Host -> 400, body exactly 'Bad Request' with the same 3-header contract (handler branch); raw HTTP/1.1 without Host -> 400 from Node's parser layer — both layers present one consistent 400 contract. PASS.
Live integration — baseline error path: valid Host + /nope -> 404 'Not found' (KEEL-104 routing intact). PASS.
